title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 478.705 - Circuit No. 26, number of judges, divisions — when judges elected
text:
478.705.  Circuit No. 26, number of judges, divisions — when judges elected. — 1.  There shall be three circuit judges in the twenty-sixth judicial circuit consisting of the counties of Camden, Laclede, Miller, Moniteau and Morgan.  These judges shall sit in divisions numbered one, two, and three.
  2.  The circuit judge in division two shall be elected in 1980.  The circuit judge in division one shall be elected in 1982.  The governor shall appoint a judge for division three and notwithstanding the provisions of section 105.030, that judge shall serve until January 1, 2021.  A judge for division three shall be elected in 2020.
(L. 1974 H.B. 1091, A.L. 1978 H.B. 1634, A.L. 2016 S.B. 578)
